summary: Iteration 4 testing: WebSocket real-time support for NxMessages, Push Notifications (VAPID), Service Worker, Super Admin verification. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend features verified with Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Messages.jsx: Push banner setTimeout(3000) is inside the useEffect that depends on user?.email — if pushSupported/permission/subscribed change after the effect runs, the banner won't appear. This is minor but could affect UX.

DELETE /api/push/subscribe requires a body (json={}) — standard HTTP DELETE doesn't always carry a body. Consider moving user_id resolution from body to auth token only (already done via Depends(get_current_user)).
broadcast_push skips if _vapid_private_pem() returns empty string but VAPID_PRIVATE_PEM_B64 is set — no actual push delivery issue in test env, but log line would be helpful for debugging.

features_verified.websocket_valid_token: WS with valid JWT connects and responds 'pong' to 'ping' ✓
features_verified.messages_page_loads: Messages page loads with NxMessage header, no JS errors ✓
features_verified.messages_ws_refs: wsRef and wsAlive.current used in Messages.jsx; fallback polling setInterval(4000) runs only when wsAlive.current is false ✓
features_verified.settings_push_section: Settings page Push Notifications card shows Enable button (data-testid=push-notifications-toggle) ✓
features_verified.message_broadcast: POST /api/entities/Message creates message and triggers asyncio.create_task(ws_manager.broadcast) ✓
features_verified.push_notification_attempt: broadcast_push called for Message entity creation (no real push delivery in test env - MOCKED)

mocked: Push notification actual delivery to real devices is MOCKED - no real browser PushSubscription available in test env. VAPID endpoints and subscription storage tested and working.
seed_data_creation: Created test Conversation and Message entities during pytest run (may need cleanup)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 4: WebSocket, Push Notifications, Service Worker all pass. Key endpoints: /api/ws/messages/{token} (WS, 4001 on bad token), /api/push/vapid-public-key, /api/push/subscribe (POST/DELETE). Messages.jsx uses wsRef+wsAlive with fallback polling. Settings page has data-testid=push-notifications-toggle. sw.js at /sw.js (HTTP 200). Super admin confirmed at admin@nxgensports.com role=super_admin.
